# Radio

Selects one option from a related set of choices.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/radio
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="radio"
  example={0}
  code={`<Radio.Root defaultValue="basic" name="plan">
  <Radio.Item value="basic" aria-label="Basic" />
  <Radio.Item value="pro" aria-label="Pro" />
  <Radio.Item value="team" aria-label="Team" />
</Radio.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Radio.Root defaultValue="basic" name="plan">
  <Radio.Item value="basic" aria-label="Basic" />
  <Radio.Item value="pro" aria-label="Pro" />
  <Radio.Item value="team" aria-label="Team" />
</Radio.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="radio"
  example={1}
  code={`<Radio.Root name="plan-invalid">
  <Radio.Item invalid value="required" aria-label="Required choice" />
</Radio.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Radio.Root name="plan-invalid">
  <Radio.Item invalid value="required" aria-label="Required choice" />
</Radio.Root>
```

## Props

No component-specific props are documented yet. Primitive props pass through to the underlying element or Radix part.

## Variants

| Variant | Values           |
| ------- | ---------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |
